portfolio_summary.macro_summary: MIXED regime with elevated caution signals: SPY RSI 73 (overbought), VIX 17.19 (contained but not complacent), Fear & Greed at 38 (fear) — a rare divergence where price momentum is extended while sentiment lags. 10Y yield at 4.36% continues to pressure growth multiples. The SPY RSI reading is the primary near-term risk: historically, corrections of 5–10% follow SPY RSI>70 within 4–6 weeks. Trim overbought tech into strength; avoid new high-beta longs until RSI normalizes below 65.

Historically, clusters of RSI>80 positions in an overbought market precede 5-15% corrections in affected names within 2-4 weeks.
cross_position_insights.recommendation: Execute trims on INTC (60-75%), FTNT (50%), and AMD (30-40%) within the next 2-3 trading sessions. Partial trims on GOOG and GOOGL for concentration management. Trim into strength — do not wait for RSI to peak.

warnings.message: 5 positions have RSI above 80 (INTC 85.1, FTNT 84.4, GOOGL 84.0, GOOG 83.3, AMD 80.8) while SPY RSI is 73 (overbought). This is a rare simultaneous extreme reading. Historically, clusters of RSI>80 in overbought markets resolve with 10-20% corrections within 2-4 weeks. Trim these positions into strength before the reversal.

3 positions are trading ABOVE analyst consensus targets: INTC ($124.92 vs $80.93 target, -35.2%), FTNT ($114.07 vs $95.69, -16.1%), TSLA ($428.35 vs $412.25, -3.8%). When price exceeds analyst consensus, risk/reward is negative. This premium is vulnerable to mean reversion.

SPY RSI at 73 signals the broad market is overbought. Fear & Greed at 38 (Fear) creates an unusual divergence: price momentum is extended while sentiment hasn't caught up. This combination often precedes a 5-8% index correction. Raise cash by trimming overbought winners (INTC, FTNT, AMD). Avoid new high-beta long positions until SPY RSI resets below 60.

MPW (138 shares) has no market data and may be delisted. Verify immediately with your broker: (1) Does the position show a price or $0.00? (2) Has it transferred OTC? (3) Were you notified of corporate actions? If delisted and worthless, file for capital loss documentation.

4 positions are in significant losses: NKE (-40.4%), LULU (-36.1%), NVO (-29.5%), CRM (-23.9%). Combined unrealized loss is approximately -$11,200. NVO should be exited (minimal analyst upside). NKE, LULU, CRM have credible recovery theses but require strict stop management.
